description_long: This is a rectangular, dark brown wooden cabinet with a simple, boxy design and a smooth, polished finish. The cabinet features a recessed panel on its front and side faces, bordered by a slightly raised frame, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. The wood grain texture is visible across all surfaces, adding a natural and realistic touch to the object. Small metallic fasteners are visible at the corners of the longer faces, suggesting reinforced construction. The cabinet appears solid and robust, suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. There are no visible handles, glass panels, or open compartments, and the object is fully closed on all sides.
description: A dark brown, rectangular wooden cabinet with a smooth, polished finish and recessed paneling. It has a solid, sturdy appearance with visible wood grain and metallic corner fasteners.
description_view_0: The short end of the cabinet is visible, showing a recessed panel framed by a raised border, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_1: The longer side of the cabinet is shown, featuring a wide recessed panel and metallic fasteners at the corners, emphasizing its solid construction.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this short end displays a recessed panel with a raised border, mirroring the opposite side.
description_view_3: This view matches view 1, showing the long side with a wide recessed panel and metallic fasteners at the corners.
